originalTitle: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
title: A Long, Long Time: Djibouti's President Stays Leader!
content:
Hello, Friends!

Hello, my wonderful friends all over Africa! I'm your special news reporter, and I'm here to tell you about something happening in a very cool country called Djibouti. It's a land of sunshine and sea on the eastern side of our amazing continent, Africa! We have some important news about who will be the leader of Djibouti for a long, long time. Imagine someone being in charge of your school for almost your whole life! That's a bit like what's happening in Djibouti.

What Happened in Djibouti?

Recently, grown-ups in Djibouti had a chance to choose their leader, who is called a president. They did this by voting. Voting is how grown-ups pick who they want to help run their country. The president they chose is named Mr. Ismail Omar Guelleh. He is 78 years old. That's a lot of birthdays! He has been the leader of Djibouti for a very, very long time already, for 27 years! That's like being born and growing up to be a big kid, and he was already president all that time. Now, he will be the president for another special time, called a 'term.' This will be his sixth time being chosen, which is a lot! It means he will stay the president. Almost everyone who voted chose him. The news said about 97 out of every 100 people who voted picked him. That's a very big number!

Meet President Guelleh!

President Ismail Omar Guelleh has been a very important person in Djibouti for many, many years. He first became president when many of your parents were probably little children, or even before they were born! Being a president is a very big job. The president helps make rules for the country, like how schools work, or if there are enough doctors, or how the roads are built. They also help decide how their country gets along with other countries around the world. It’s a bit like being the captain of a big ship, guiding it through the waters.

What is Voting?

You might hear the word 'vote' or 'election.' These are big words for something simple. Imagine your class choosing what game to play. Everyone puts up their hand for their favourite game, right? Voting for a president is like that, but grown-ups do it for the whole country. They go to a special place and mark a paper or press a button to show who they want to be their leader. Every grown-up's choice counts, and the person with the most choices gets to be the leader. It’s a very important way for people to have a say in their country. **Did you know?** Even though you are small, you will get to vote when you are a grown-up! It's how you can help choose who leads your country and makes big decisions.

Why Some People Didn't Vote

Now, this part is a little tricky. There were other people who also wanted to be president. We call them 'opposition candidates.' They are like other teams in a game, who want to play and try to win. But many of these other people decided not to take part in the voting this time. They said, 'We don't think this game is fair, so we won't play.' This is called a 'boycott.' They believed that the way the voting was going to happen wasn't completely right. So, they decided to stay home and not join in the vote at all. Because they didn't join, it meant that most of the votes went to President Guelleh, making it look like almost everyone chose him.

Where is Djibouti?

Let's zoom in on our map of Africa! Djibouti is a small country found in East Africa. It's right by the sea, next to countries like Ethiopia, Eritrea, and Somalia. It's a very important place because it's right on the Red Sea, which is a very busy waterway for big ships carrying goods all over the world. Many ships pass by Djibouti every single day! **Did you know?** Djibouti is famous for a very salty lake called Lake Assal! It's one of the lowest places on Earth, and it's so salty that you can float easily in it, just like in the Dead Sea!

What's Special About Djibouti?

Djibouti is a hot and sunny country, often with beautiful clear blue skies. It has amazing beaches and even volcanoes that are not active anymore, so they won't erupt. It's a wonderful place to see colourful fish and coral reefs if you go diving or snorkeling in the Red Sea. Imagine swimming with so many different kinds of sea creatures! The people of Djibouti are very friendly. They speak different languages, like Arabic and French, and also local languages like Afar and Somali. How cool is that? **Did you know?** Some parts of Djibouti look like other planets because of their strange rock formations and volcanic lands! Scientists sometimes go there to study how Earth looked a long, long time ago.

What Does This Mean for Kids?

When a president stays in charge for a very long time, it usually means things in the country don't change very quickly. The same person keeps making the big decisions for many years. For the children of Djibouti, President Guelleh will continue to be the leader who makes choices about their schools, their parks, and their hospitals. These are all very important things for kids! It's a big responsibility, and leaders always try to do what they think is best for their country and all the people, especially the children. Just like your teachers and parents make rules to keep you safe and help you learn, a president makes rules to help the whole country grow and be safe.

Our African Home

Djibouti is just one of the many special countries that make up our amazing continent of Africa. Each country has its own story, its own leaders, and its own way of doing things. Learning about what happens in different parts of Africa helps us understand our big, beautiful home better. We are all connected, like parts of a giant, colourful puzzle. Even though this news is about grown-ups and elections, it's good for you to know about it. It helps you understand how countries work and how leaders are chosen.

Keep Exploring!

So, President Guelleh will continue to lead Djibouti. It's a big event for their country and an important piece of news for all of us to know and understand. Remember to always ask questions and learn about the world around you. There are so many interesting things happening every day, right here in Africa and beyond! Thank you for listening, my clever young news explorers! See you next time for more exciting news from Africa!
summary: In the country of Djibouti, President Guelleh will stay the leader for even longer, for his sixth time, even though some people who wanted to be president didn't join the vote.
whyMatters: It's important because the president helps decide how the country works, like making rules for schools and hospitals, and his long time as leader means big changes usually happen slowly in Djibouti.

originalTitle: Neymar has to prove his fitness for Brazil’s World Cup squad: Ancelotti
title: Neymar's Big Race for the World Cup!
content:
Hello, amazing kids across Africa! I'm your special news reporter, and guess what? We have some exciting news about a super famous football player today! His name is Neymar. He plays football for Brazil, a country far away that loves football just as much as we do here in Africa! Neymar is like a superhero on the football field. He can dribble the ball with amazing tricks and score beautiful goals. Many children around the world dream of playing football just like him!

Who is Neymar?

Neymar is a football superstar! He is known for his fast feet and his big smile. When he plays, the crowd cheers so loudly! He is one of the best players in the world. He makes playing football look like magic. He wears the number 10 jersey for his country, Brazil. This number is often given to the best players on the team. Did you know? Neymar has scored many, many goals for Brazil! He is one of their top goal scorers ever!

What is the World Cup?

Imagine the biggest football party you can ever think of! That's the World Cup! It's a huge tournament where countries from all over the world send their best teams to play against each other. They all want to win the big, shiny, golden trophy. The World Cup only happens every four years, so it's a very special event! Did you know? Many brave and strong teams from Africa, like Senegal, Morocco, and Ghana, also play in the World Cup! They make our continent very proud!

Neymar's Big Challenge!

Now, for the news about Neymar! Brazil has a special person called a 'coach'. A coach is like a teacher for the football team. He helps the players get better and stronger. Brazil's coach, Mr. Ancelotti, has said something very important about Neymar. He said Neymar needs to be super, super strong and healthy. He needs to be 'fit'. What does 'fit' mean for a football player? It means his body must be ready to run very fast, kick the ball hard, and play for a long, long time without getting tired. It means he must be in perfect shape to play the best football.

Why is Fitness Important?

Think about how much you run and play every day! Now imagine playing football for 90 minutes! That's a very long time. Football players need lots of energy and strong legs. If Neymar is not perfectly fit, he might get tired quickly during a game. Or even worse, he could get hurt. The coach wants all his players to be in the very best condition so they can win. So, Neymar has a big job to do: he needs to work hard to get his body ready. Did you know? Professional footballers train almost every day! They also eat healthy food like fruits, vegetables, and lean meat to keep their bodies strong and full of energy.

Joining the Team (The Squad)

When we talk about the 'squad', we mean the special group of players chosen to play in the World Cup. It's like picking the best team for a big game at school, but for the whole country! Only the very best and fittest players get to be in this special squad. Neymar has about two months to show his coach that he is strong and ready. He needs to train very hard and prove he can play his best football. If he shows he is fit, then he can join his friends on the Brazil team! Did you know? Each World Cup team usually chooses about 23 players to be in their squad! It's a big honour to be picked.

Brazil Loves Football!

Brazil is a country famous for its love of football. They are passionate about the game, just like many people here in Africa! They have won the World Cup many times, more than any other country. Because of this, everyone in Brazil really wants their best players, like Neymar, to be ready to play. Neymar is one of their biggest stars, and when he plays, the whole country gets excited. They want him to help them win the golden trophy again. It's a lot of pressure, but Neymar is a very strong player. Did you know? Brazil has won the World Cup five times! That's a lot of trophies!

What Happens Next?

So, what will Neymar do now? He will work very, very hard! He will spend hours training, running, kicking the ball, and doing special exercises to make his muscles strong. His coach will watch him very closely. If Neymar shows he is fit and ready, then he will surely get to play for Brazil in the World Cup. We all hope he gets well and strong so he can join the fun! Football is always more exciting when all the amazing players are on the field, showing off their skills.

Football Connects Us All!

Here in Africa, we love football too! We cheer for our local teams, our national teams, and we also enjoy watching amazing players like Neymar from other parts of the world. Football brings so many smiles to people's faces. It teaches us about teamwork, never giving up, and trying our best. It's a game that connects children and grown-ups everywhere. So, let's all send our good wishes to Neymar. We hope he gets fit and strong to play in the big World Cup! Did you know? The very first World Cup football tournament was played in 1930! That was a very, very long time ago! That's all the news for today, my little football fans! Keep playing and keep cheering! See you next time!
summary: Neymar, a famous football player from Brazil, needs to get super strong and healthy in the next two months to be chosen for his country's team for the big World Cup tournament.
whyMatters: This is important because Neymar is one of the best players in the world, and if he is fit, he can help Brazil try to win the World Cup trophy. Everyone wants to see the best players playing!

originalTitle: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
title: A Big Singing Star from India Goes to Sleep
content:
Hello, my lovely friends! From your friend, the news reporter! Today, we have a story about a very special lady from a far-away country called India. Her name was Asha Bhosle, and she was a super-duper star!

Who was Asha Bhosle?

Imagine a lady who loved to sing more than anything. Asha Bhosle was just like that! She was a singer, which means she used her beautiful voice to make music. She sang for many, many years, and her songs made millions of people very happy. She was like a music queen! Did you know? India is a very big country in Asia, a continent far away from Africa! It has lots of wonderful music and movies.

A Special Voice That Made People Dance

Asha Bhosle had a voice that was full of magic. When she sang, people just wanted to tap their feet and dance! Her songs were often for movies, especially movies from something called 'Bollywood'. What is Bollywood? Well, it's like a really, really big place where people make lots of movies in India. These movies often have amazing songs and dances, just like a big musical party! Asha's voice was the sound of these parties. It was so catchy, meaning you would hear it and want to sing along right away! It was like the perfect song for jumping and twirling around.

Singing for Many Years

Asha Bhosle lived for a very, very long time. She was 92 years old when she went to sleep. Can you imagine being 92? That's more than ninety birthdays! Because she lived so long, she sang for many, many years. She started singing when she was a young girl and kept singing almost until she was very old. That's a lot of songs! Did you know? Living to 92 years old is a very special thing! It means you have seen many seasons and many changes in the world.

Thousands of Songs!

This amazing lady sang thousands and thousands of songs. Think about all your favorite songs. Now, imagine singing even more than that! It's hard to count how many she sang, but it was a lot. Each song brought joy to someone. Her songs were like sunshine on a cloudy day. They made people smile, feel excited, and sometimes even a little bit romantic. She could sing all kinds of songs, making her voice change to fit the mood perfectly. Did you know? Some singers are called 'versatile' because they can sing many different kinds of songs, just like Asha could!

Music for Everyone

Asha's music was loved by grandmothers and grandfathers, mothers and fathers, and even children! Her songs were played at parties, at weddings, and just in people's homes every day. They became like a special part of growing up in India. Her voice was like a friend who always made you feel good. Even if you don't speak the language, you could still feel the happiness and the beat of her music. Music is amazing because it can make us all feel connected, no matter where we live. Did you know? Music is a language that everyone can understand, even if the words are different!

A Sister Who Also Sang

Asha Bhosle also had a sister who was a very famous singer, too! Her name was Lata Mangeshkar. It was like a family of singing stars! Imagine having a brother or sister who also loved to sing as much as you do. They both shared their amazing voices with the world, making many wonderful songs together and separately. It's so nice when families can share a special talent like that. Did you know? Having a talent means you are very good at something, like singing, drawing, or playing a sport!

Remembering Her Music

When someone very special like Asha Bhosle goes to sleep forever, we feel a little sad. But we also remember all the wonderful things they did. We remember her happy songs and how she made people feel. Her songs will still be played. Kids like you, and even your children's children, will still listen to her beautiful voice and dance to her tunes. Her music will live on forever, like a bright star in the sky. Did you know? When we remember someone's work or art after they are gone, it's called their 'legacy'. Asha Bhosle left a wonderful legacy of music!

A Big Thank You to Asha

So, even though our singing star Asha Bhosle has gone to sleep, we say a big thank you to her. Thank you for all the happy songs, all the dancing, and all the joy you brought to the world. You truly were the sound of Bollywood, making generations of people sing and smile. Keep listening to music, my friends! It's a wonderful gift. Maybe you can even sing some songs yourself today!
summary: A very famous Indian singer named Asha Bhosle, who sang thousands of joyful songs for movies, has passed away at 92 years old, leaving behind a wonderful legacy of music that made millions happy.
whyMatters: Asha Bhosle's happy songs made millions of people smile and dance for many years, and her beautiful music will continue to bring joy to families and friends all around the world for a very long time.
